question: How long does a typical renovation take?
answer: Most renovation projects take between 4 and 12 weeks from start to finish. A basic basement finishing typically takes 4–6 weeks. A bathroom remodel takes 2–4 weeks. A full kitchen renovation takes 4–8 weeks. A complete basement suite with kitchen and bathroom can take 8–12 weeks. Timeline depends on project scope, permit processing time, material lead times, and trade scheduling. We provide a detailed project schedule before work begins and communicate any changes proactively.
